title: Sales Representative
salary_range: Salary - Base salary + commission If you do wel
meta_description: Keski-Suomen Laatukoti Oy is seeking a motivated Sales Representative in Jyväskylä to grow their customer base and provide exceptional service. Join our
description: Keski-Suomen Laatukoti Oy, based in Jyväskylä, is seeking a motivated Sales Representative to join their team. This role involves acquiring new customers and selling roof repairs, with the goal of providing an exceptional customer experience. The ideal candidate should have a strong attitude, desire to trade, and courage to face customers. A background in sales or a willingness to learn quickly will be beneficial. Experience is not required; training will be provided for those who can take on this challenging position. The salary includes a base pay with commission, making it an attractive opportunity for someone looking to grow their income. This family-owned business has been in the roofing industry for over 18 years and boasts more than 2,000 satisfied customers across Central Finland.
job_responsibilities: Acquiring customers and selling roof repairs
Customer meetings (arranged + own activity a plus)
Mapping of objects and selling the solution to the customer
Making offers and making deals
what_we_offer: Clearly rising income above basic salary if you do well
search_keywords: sales, marketing, roof repair, customer acquisition, job description

title: Substitute for hygienist, Tyks Infection Control Unit, Turku
meta_description: Varsinais-Suomen hyvinvointialue is seeking a substitute for hygienist at Tyks Infection Control Unit in Turku, Finland. Apply now for eligibility under the
description: We are seeking a substitute for hygienist at Tyks Infection Control Unit in Turku, Finland. This position requires eligibility under the Act on Healthcare Professionals and a hygienist qualification through specialization studies or equivalent competence. Previous experience as a hygiene nurse or infection control contact person, proficiency with the SAI program, and Swedish language skills are advantages. The unit is staffed by 5 hygiene nurses, a clinical nursing specialist, department secretary, senior doctor, infectious diseases doctors, and ward nurse. Knowledge of Finnish is essential for this role. Interviews begin during the application period, and the position will be filled promptly upon finding a suitable candidate.
what_we_expect: Legalization in accordance with the Act on Healthcare Professionals (559/1994)
Qualification of a hygienist obtained through specialization studies or equivalent competence acquired in other ways
Previous work as a hygiene nurse or infection control contact person
job_responsibilities: Infection monitoring
Reporting
Epidemic management
Guidance and advice on infection control work
Training of personnel
Acting as an expert in cooperation with various actors
what_we_offer: Staffed by 5 hygiene nurses, a clinical nursing specialist, a department secretary, a senior doctor, 2 infectious diseases doctors and a ward nurse
Multi-professional and active unit enabling good consultation opportunities and a support network for those getting familiar with the work
The workplace is located in Tyks General Hospital
search_keywords: hygienist, infection control, nursing care, primary health care, Infectious Diseases Act, SAI program, Swedish language skills, healthcare professionals, legalisation, qualification, experience, support network

title: Summer job, nurse
meta_description: Join Varsinais-Suomen hyvinvointialue as a Nurse at Tyks urology polyclinic in Turku this summer! Independent nursing work, outpatient research, and procedure
description: We are seeking a nurse to join our urology outpatient clinic at Tyks T-hospital in Turku. This is a summer job opportunity focused on independent nursing work, patient guidance, and implementation of outpatient research and treatment procedures. Key responsibilities include assessing treatment needs, assisting doctors with procedures like cystoscopies and catheterizations, performing independent nurse visits according to operating models, providing guidance and counseling for examinations and treatments, handling treatment-related communication, using appointment and patient information systems, and taking care of equipment.
what_we_expect: Having good interaction and guidance skills
The ability to work independently and in a team
An interest in the specialty field of urology and developing expertise
Experience in specialized nursing or outpatient work is considered an advantage
job_responsibilities: Assessing the need for treatment of urological patients and coordinating treatment
Assisting doctors in outpatient procedures (e.g., cystoscopies, biopsies, catheterizations)
Performing independent nursing duties and patient guidance
Guiding and counseling patients regarding examinations, treatments, and follow-up care
Communicating with patients about appointments and digital communication related to treatment
what_we_offer: A happy, mutually supportive, unified work community where everyone can be themselves
Valuable work experience in specialized nursing
Orientation and learning opportunities for new employees
The opportunity to gain valuable work experience in a specialized field
A pleasant working environment with a focus on learning and teamwork
search_keywords: summer job, nurse, Tyks urology polyclinic, Turku

title: Assistant Manager, Salesperson
salary_range: The salary of the responsibility salesperson is based on the collective agreement in the trade sector and the responsibility bonus for each task. The hourly wage is €11.98 - €16.03/h, depending on education and years of experience. In shift work, evening and weekend bonuses bring a nice extra bonus on top of the basic salary. In addition, you have the option of an incentive bonus, which can be up to €1.20 per working hour.
meta_description: 1240 TURUN OSUUSKAUPPA is seeking a Assistant manager, responsible salesperson, Prisma Wiklund, Turku, Turku Osuuskauppa in Turku. We are now looking for a
description: We are now looking for a salesperson to join the role of assistant manager and responsible salespeople at Prisma Wiklund, set to open in Turku by the end of 2026. As an assistant manager, you will act as the manager's right-hand man, managing day-to-day activities through employee strengths and responding positively to changing situations. Your duties include ensuring smooth store operations and customer satisfaction with the help of the manager and assistant manager. The salary for this position is based on collective agreement in the trade sector and a task-specific responsibility bonus, ranging from €2460-2797 per month depending on education and experience. Shift work includes evening and weekend bonuses, as well as an incentive bonus up to €1.20 per working hour.
what_we_expect: Positive working attitude and good communication skills
job_responsibilities: Organize activities through the strengths of employees and react to rapidly changing situations with a positive and professional approach.
Lead by example, work in all store tasks and ensure a high-quality customer experience together with the team.
Primary location
what_we_offer: Value shopping benefits with S-advantage card, such as 25% at S group restaurants, 15% at Sokos and Emotion stores or 50% at car washes.
Comprehensive introduction to job and professional growth opportunities.
Working with mirrors, we offer you

title: Information Security Manager
meta_description: Kuopion kaupunki is seeking an experienced Information Security Manager for a permanent contract with competitive salary ranging from €5,020.76 - €5,248.
description: Kuopion kaupunki is looking for an experienced Information Security Manager to join their team. This full-time position offers a permanent contract and competitive salary ranging from €5,020.76 - €5,248.97 per month. The ideal candidate should have a university degree in information security or related fields, with at least 5 years of experience as an Information Security Manager, expert, or similar role. Responsibilities include developing and maintaining the city's information security management model, operational information security monitoring and reporting, technical control implementation, coordination of IT acquisitions and projects, and promoting information security knowledge.
